description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline using the docker:latest image with a docker:dind service and define variables CONTAINER_RELEASE_IMAGE, CONTAINER_TEST_IMAGE, DOCKER_DRIVER. Add a before_script that logs in to registry.gitlab.com with the gitlab-ci-token and $CI_BUILD_TOKEN. Define a build stage with a build job that runs in the build stage, executes `docker run --rm -v "$(pwd):/src" -v /var/run/docker.sock:/var/run/docker.sock -e COMPRESS_BINARY=true centurylink/golang-builder $CONTAINER_TEST_IMAGE` and then `docker push $CONTAINER_TEST_IMAGE`. The job has no additional rules, caches, or artifacts and runs on every pipeline.
